use_cases: Displaying team members or collaborators on a project management card
Showing users who have reacted or engaged with content in social apps
Displaying members in a shared workspace or group interface
Indicating assignees or participants in task management tools
Showing recent viewers or online users in real-time dashboards
ai_summary: UserAvatars is a composite React component that displays a stacked group of user profile images with configurable overlap, hover animations, and accessibility features. It supports keyboard navigation, tooltip placement, RTL layouts, and customizable sizing with motion effects for a polished avatar group display suitable for SaaS dashboards, collaboration tools, and social interfaces.
